message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German Federal Election 1972 (Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Behavior in the Federal Republic of Germany: German Federal Election 1972)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0501","justification":"This dataset covers political attitudes, participation, and voter behavior during the 1972 German Federal Election, directly matching the topic of elections in Germany in the 1970s."},{"title":"German Federal Election 1976 (Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Behavior in the Federal Republic of Germany: German Federal Election 1976)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA1151","justification":"This dataset provides detailed information related to the 1976 election in Germany, including voter attitudes, participation, and behavior."},{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Behavior in the Federal Republic (PAPI) - German Federal Election 1972","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0501","justification":"The DOI points to a GESIS-hosted dataset specifically about the German Federal Election 1972, a central election of the 1970s."},{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Behavior in the Federal Republic (PAPI) - German Federal Election 1976","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1151","justification":"This DOI leads to a dataset concerning the 1976 federal election in Germany, highlighting relevant electoral research from the 1970s."},{"title":"German Election Studies: Bundestag Election 1976 (Trend Surveys)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA1422","justification":"This dataset contains repeated surveys around the 1976 Bundestag election, offering insight into ongoing electoral trends during the 1970s."},{"title":"German Election Studies: Bundestag Election 1972 (Trend Surveys)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA1421","justification":"This dataset provides trend surveys associated with the 1972 Bundestag election, reflecting continuous electoral research in 1970s Germany."}]}
